rationale: CR-001 is resolved. The fix-up diff updates the three v1/projects mock fixtures from display_name: null to real display name strings ('Project A Display', 'Project B Display', 'Project C Display'), updates the selectMultiSelectOptions call to use display names, and adds a waitFor chip assertion (getByText(/Project A Display/)). The test passes at 632ms; all 69 tests in the WorkflowsListPage suite pass. No new issues introduced — the change is purely a test update with no production code affected.

finding_status.notes: display_name: null fixtures replaced with real strings; selectMultiSelectOptions updated to use display names; waitFor chip assertion added; test passes at 632ms
